summary: ANDROID 🟥 Changes to some options are not properly propagated between mobile and PC part 2
scenario: Voice Prompts & Tones settings changes on PC are not propagated to Android device
description_clean: Changes to Voice Prompts & Tones settings (Calls, Hold Reminder, Incoming Call, Active Audio Tone, Answering Call, Answer/Ignore) are not propagated from PC to Android when changed on PC. Settings changed on one platform should be properly propagated to every other platform.
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android device.
2. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Audio Settings → Voice Prompts & Tones.
3. Observe current settings for Calls, Hold Reminder, Incoming Call, Active Audio Tone, Answering Call, and Answer/Ignore.
4. On a PC with the same Poly device paired, open the Poly Lens Desktop app or Poly Device Settings.
5. Navigate to Voice Prompts & Tones settings.
6. Change one or more of the following settings: Calls, Hold Reminder, Incoming Call, Active Audio Tone, Answering Call, Answer/Ignore.
7. Save or apply the changes on the PC.
8. Wait for the device to sync (e.g., reconnect or refresh).
9. On the Android device, open Poly Studio Mobile → [Device Name] → Audio Settings → Voice Prompts & Tones.
10. Check whether the changed settings now match the values set on the PC.
expected: The Voice Prompts & Tones settings changed on the PC should be propagated to the Android device and appear updated in the Poly Studio Mobile app.
actual: The Voice Prompts & Tones settings remain unchanged on the Android device; changes made on the PC are not reflected.
